pi_items.source: export_result.sh PDF_FILE target check and task.json prompt
export_result.sh PNG_FILE target check and task.json prompt
verifier.py uses metadata min_size_bytes defaulting to 5000 and checks if generated sizes are strictly greater
verifier.py parses the IHDR chunk in the generated PNG and explicitly checks if width > 100 and height > 100

privileged_info_summary: The task requires the agent to export an existing open EdrawMax flowchart template to both PDF and PNG formats. The expected output directory is explicitly '/home/ga/Documents/exports/'. The expected filenames are 'diagram_export.pdf' and 'diagram_export.png'. Both exported files must have a minimum size of 5000 bytes, and the PNG image must have minimum dimensions of 100x100 pixels, as strictly enforced by the verifier logic.
